inputs.titre: Publication du "Dialogue sur les deux grands systèmes du monde"

reason: The image depicts a plausible scene for the 17th century: Galileo in a study, with appropriate clothing, furnishings, and lighting. The elements match the description provided. The details of the hat, the leather doublet, the lace collar and the book all seem credible. The bookshelves and general atmosphere suggest a place of study. However the quality of the image makes some of the details appear to clean and precise. The paper of the book appears somewhat too white for the time period. The pen on the table could be an anachronism depending on the precise style.
